dslRule:
<!id: add.deprecated.to.method.of.deprecated.type>
<!description: Add @Deprecated to a method if its enclosing class is deprecated but the method is not. This aligns with the COMPILER_PB_MEMBER_OF_DEPRECATED_TYPE warning.
>
<!severity: WARNING>

$retType $methodName($params$) :: containsAnnotation("java.lang.Deprecated") && !isDeprecated($methodName) && !isInConstructor()
=> @java.lang.Deprecated $retType $methodName($params$)
;;

verification.message: Candidate DSL must contain only one rule and optional per-rule metadata; file metadata, includes, and embedded Java are not promotable

dslRule:
<!id: markdown.javadoc.indentation.fix>
<!description: Adds a space after '///' in markdown Javadoc comments to ensure correct indentation in the Javadoc auto-indent strategy.
This rule specifically targets the JavaDocAutoIndentStrategy class to avoid unintended side effects on other string literals.
>
<!severity: INFO>

$buf.append("///") :: inClass("org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.text.javadoc.JavaDocAutoIndentStrategy")
=> $buf.append("/// ")
;;
summary: Adds a trailing space to the string literal "///" when passed to an append method, specifically within the JavaDocAutoIndentStrategy class to correct markdown comment indentation.

verification.message: Candidate DSL must contain only one rule and optional per-rule metadata; file metadata, includes, and embedded Java are not promotable

dslRule:
<!id: use-diamond-operator>
<!description: Replace explicit type arguments with the diamond operator where type can be inferred by the compiler (Java 7+).
This transformation is only applied if the compiler infers the same type with the diamond operator, ensuring semantic equivalence.>
<!severity: HINT>

new $Type<$Exprs$>()
=>
new $Type<>()
;;
summary: Replaces explicit type arguments in constructor calls (e.g., `new ArrayList<String>()`) with the diamond operator (`new ArrayList<>()`) if type inference allows for identical type derivation. This is a common Java 7+ modernization.

verification.message: Candidate DSL must contain only one rule and optional per-rule metadata; file metadata, includes, and embedded Java are not promotable

dslRule:
/*!
<!id: replace-tabs-to-spaces-converter>
<!description: Replace TabsToSpacesConverter with JavaTabsToSpacesConverter for Java-specific handling.
<!severity: INFO>
*/
new org.eclipse.jface.text.TabsToSpacesConverter()
=>
new org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.javaeditor.JavaTabsToSpacesConverter()
;;

verification.message: Java compile error at line 3: The import org.eclipse.jface.text.TabsToSpacesConverter cannot be resolved

dslRule:
<!id: use-unimplemented-code-cleanup-core>
<!description: Replace instantiation of UnimplementedCodeCleanUp with UnimplementedCodeCleanUpCore, reflecting an internal refactoring within JDT UI components.>
<!severity: HINT>

new org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.fix.UnimplementedCodeCleanUp($args$)
=>
new org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.fix.UnimplementedCodeCleanUpCore($args$)
;;
summary: Replaces direct instantiation of `org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.fix.UnimplementedCodeCleanUp` with `org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.fix.UnimplementedCodeCleanUpCore`, reflecting a class name change during an internal JDT refactoring.

verification.message: Candidate DSL must contain only one rule and optional per-rule metadata; file metadata, includes, and embedded Java are not promotable

/*!
<!id: refactor-typeparameterscleanup>
<!description: Refactor TypeParametersCleanUp to TypeParametersCleanUpCore.
<!severity: INFO>

new org.eclipse.jdt.internal.ui.fix.TypeParametersCleanUp($args$)
=>

;;
